creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 198846
py-boolean.py-3.6.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates devel/py-boolean.py to 3.6 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/bastikr/boolean.py/compare/v3.5...v3.6

Changes to the port:
- Switched from CHEESESHOP to GH because no tar balls are available at PyPi for version 3.6
